Inputs: Name-value options; TaskReady files; QC masks; MVGC toolbox functions
Outputs: TaskReady files; QC mask files; MVGC CSV outputs; task-specific manifests
Purpose_or_description: Standardized wrapper that runs MARA preprocessing, mathematical QC, and ROI-level MVGC with pseudo-dyad permutation nulls.
Notes: Run in MATLAB after adding the scripts folder to the path.

Inputs: Folder containing raw TXT data and later *_TaskReady.mat files
Outputs: Used by MARA, QC, and MVGC stages
Purpose_or_description: Defines the main working/data directory for the fNIRS pipeline.
Notes: Can be overridden with CARE_Full_MARA_QC_MVGC_Pipeline_Run('TaskReadyDir', path).

Purpose_or_description: Defines the central folder for mathematical QC masks and QC summary tables.
Notes: Created automatically by the master runner if missing and DryRun is false.

Inputs: Raw concentration TXT files; parent.SD; fNIRS_Task_Marker_Manipulated.csv
Purpose_or_description: Controls whether the MARA and TaskReady generation stage is run.
Notes: Set false to preserve existing TaskReady files and run only QC/MVGC.

Purpose_or_description: Controls whether mathematical QC and channel keep-mask generation is run.
Notes: QC is needed before MVGC because MVGC uses the saved keep masks.

Purpose_or_description: Controls whether ROI-level MVGC and pseudo-dyad null analyses are run.
Notes: Runs once for each task listed in Tasks.

Purpose_or_description: Defines which task contexts are analyzed by MVGC.
Notes: Only ST and FT are accepted by the master runner.

Purpose_or_description: Checks and prints what the pipeline would run without modifying files.
Notes: Useful before rerunning a pipeline when you do not want to overwrite or regenerate files.

Purpose_or_description: Parses Shimadzu concentration TXT files, separates parent and child Hb signals, applies MARA motion correction, optionally applies WTC denoising, creates QC plots, and segments data into baseline/structured/free-task TaskReady files.
Notes: MARA is run on reshaped time-by-66 data and reshaped back to time-by-3-by-22 concentration arrays.

Purpose_or_description: Reads raw concentration rows, separates parent and child signals, and stores HbO/HbR/HbT as nTime-by-3-by-22 arrays.
Notes: Parent and child are assumed to use the same 22-channel layout.

Purpose_or_description: Applies MARA to continuous parent and child concentration signals and saves corrected HbO, HbR, and HbT matrices.
Notes: Corrected matrices are also stored as convenient parent/child hbo, hbr, and hbt fields.

Purpose_or_description: Creates before/after plots for visual inspection of MARA correction.
Notes: Plots are diagnostic and are separate from the mathematical QC masks used for MVGC.

Stage_or_Item: Task segmentation and optional WTC denoising
Purpose_or_description: Segments continuous corrected signals into baseline, structured task, and free task periods and prepares GC-ready data structures.
Notes: These files become the direct input to the mathematical QC stage.

Purpose_or_description: Computes channel-level quality metrics and saves role/task/segment-specific keep masks for parent and child channels.
Notes: Negative Hb values are allowed; the script does not rectify or take absolute values.

Purpose_or_description: Always excludes channels that are not part of the later GC analysis.
Notes: Remaining 16 channels support the four ROI definitions used in MVGC.

Default_value_or_location: min_sd_ratio=0.10; spike_mad_k=6; max_spike_rate=0.02; drift bad=0.08; kurt_z_bad=4; ADF alpha=0.05
Purpose_or_description: Flags flat/noisy/drifting/spiky/nonstationary channels using mathematical criteria.
Notes: Default policy keeps GOOD channels only; BORDERLINE channels are not kept unless keep_borderline is set true.

Purpose_or_description: Applies masks by preserving 22 columns and setting dropped channels to NaN.
Notes: Preserving dimensions keeps channel identities stable for ROI mapping.

Default_value_or_location: Runs separately for each task in Tasks
Outputs: Task-specific GC real, pseudo/null, summary, and manifest CSV files
Purpose_or_description: Builds 4-ROI parent and child time series, estimates multivariate Granger causality, and compares real dyads with pseudo-dyad null distributions.
Notes: The same MVGC engine is used for real and null dyads.

Outputs: Eight ROI time series: four parent ROIs and four child ROIs
Purpose_or_description: Averages valid channels into four fixed ROIs for each member of the dyad.
Notes: Requires at least 2 good channels per ROI; current configuration requires all 4 ROIs.

Outputs: Cached eligible dyad structures with X, fs, Tobs, and model order
Purpose_or_description: Builds or reloads eligible dyads for each task to avoid repeated preprocessing.
Notes: If cached eligibility should be refreshed, clear the relevant cache file intentionally.

Purpose_or_description: Detrends and z-scores ROI time series before VAR/MVGC estimation.
Notes: Analysis is based on HbO.

Purpose_or_description: Selects a model order for each real dyad before MVGC estimation.
Notes: Real dyad model orders are not forced onto pseudo dyads; null mode is configured separately.

Purpose_or_description: Creates parent-child recombinations across different dyads to estimate dyad-specificity null distributions.
Notes: When full ordered pool is true, number of pseudo dyads equals nReal*(nReal-1).

Inputs: Real global interbrain GC; pseudo-dyad null
Outputs: Global, edge, route, and asymmetry comparison CSVs
Purpose_or_description: Tests whether real dyads show stronger interbrain GC than pseudo-dyad null expectations.
Notes: Primary tail is upper-tailed real > null.

Purpose_or_description: Contains baseline, structured-task, and free-task segments for parent and child signals.
Notes: Generated by CARE_MARA_TaskReady_Run.

Purpose_or_description: Stores channel labels, keep masks, metrics, and cleaned HbO/HbR matrices by dyad/task/segment/role.
Notes: Generated by CARE_TaskReady_QC_and_Masks_Run.

Purpose_or_description: Long-format table describing each dyad, task, segment, role, and channel quality result.
Notes: Useful for reporting data quality and channel exclusion.

Purpose_or_description: Summarizes number and percentage of GOOD/BORDERLINE/BAD channels per dyad, task, segment, and role.
Notes: Useful for sample/channel retention reporting.

Purpose_or_description: Stores real-dyad MVGC results, pseudo-dyad null results, permutation tests, and pipeline manifest for each task.
Notes: Exact files depend on task and export switches in CARE_MVGC_4ROI_Run.

Purpose_or_description: Runs MARA, QC, and MVGC for both ST and FT.
Notes: Use only when you want to regenerate preprocessing products.

Purpose_or_description: Runs only QC and MVGC without regenerating TaskReady files.
Notes: Useful when you do not want to disturb previous preprocessing outputs.

Purpose_or_description: Checks paths and planned stages without writing files.
Notes: Good first command before a major rerun.
